positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial map featuring interconnected constellations and astronomical symbols, depicted using thick, continuous lines and negative space. The primary colors are deep sapphire blue, cosmic indigo, muted gold leaf, and creamy off-white. The composition should be symmetrical and highly graphic, resembling an antique yet modernized celestial chart. The main subject is a central, stylized ouroboros embracing a stylized moon and stars. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric line art. Lighting must be ethereal and uniform, perfect for screen printing. High contrast, clean lines, vector art aesthetic, perfectly centered for apparel printing.
